headline: Baker Hughes (BKR) Delivers Strong Q1 Results Despite Middle East Disruptions
summary: With gains of 13.32% between April 1 and April 27, Baker Hughes Company (NASDAQ:BKR) is included in our list of the 7 Energy & Utility Stocks that are on Fire in April. headline: Qatar pushes ahead with North Field expansion despite LNG disruptions
summary: Qatar is moving ahead with its North Field gas expansion after awarding a key contract, even as regional tensions continue to disrupt LNG output and exports.View on euronews

headline: Tech's hyperscalers face Wall Street for first time since U.S. Iran war sent oil prices soaring
summary: Wall Street is optimistic about big tech companies and their data center construction plans, despite a memory shortage and the Iran war.
